key_layers.name: Core domain
key_layers.responsibility: OKF store (atomic IO), LlmProvider trait + Claude adapter, hashing-embedder retrieval, fetch, digest, ask, settings

key_layers.name: IPC bridge
key_layers.responsibility: Tauri commands: get/set_settings, list_pages, submit_source, ask_question

key_layers.name: Frontend lib
key_layers.responsibility: typed Tauri API client, navigation stores, neo-brutalist components

key_layers.name: Frontend shell
key_layers.responsibility: SvelteKit SPA shell (adapter-static, ssr=false), store-driven routing

external_deps.purpose: LLM provider for digest + ask (provider-agnostic trait)

gotchas: Never hold a MutexGuard across an `.await` in commands.rs (guards are not Send) — drop the lock at the statement before awaiting
SPA only (ssr=false) — no server routes or server-side load
Settings (incl. API key) are in-memory only — not persisted across app restarts
test_isolation: unit-test temp dirs use a process-wide AtomicU64 counter (okf-{pid}-{n}), not PID-only, to avoid parallel collisions

conventions.formatter: rustfmt (cargo fmt); no JS formatter configured
conventions.branch_strategy: trunk-based with short-lived feature/fix/chore branches off main
